name: 白蓮花偽善型
description: 假千金用看似善良體貼的話暗中貶低真千金。表面關心實則挑釁，每句話都暗藏刀鋒。觀眾能看穿但劇中人被騙，製造焦慮感和期待打臉的快感。
tags: 製造焦慮/引發憤怒/鋪墊打臉

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Sister, you haven't been in the capital for long. / There are definitely many things I'm not used to. / Mom and my brothers are all very busy / They probably won't have time to care about you. / From now on, just treat this place like your own home.
examples.context: 製造焦慮/引發憤怒/鋪墊打臉
